name: Tuna Toasties
recipeIngredient: 220 g can of tuna or skinned salmon
1 Loaf white sliced bread, crusts removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients and mix well.
2. Brush both sides of slices of the bread with melted butter. Spread tuna filling on one side, roll up diagonally, secure with a toothpick, and sprinkle with paprika.
3. Bake at 200 degrees C for 10-15 minutes.
(Note: To make coconut milk, soak 1 cup desiccated coconut in 1 cup warm water for 15 minutes. Drain and squeeze all liquid from the coconut. Use the resulting light liquid; discard the leftover coconut. This yields about 1 cup.)
